# This file is autogenerated by hrpc-c
# !!DO NOT EDIT!!
#
# Expects: `compact`, `rpc`, and `sync_schema` CMake targets provided by the consumer.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.0)

project(sync_hrpc C)

add_library(sync_hrpc OBJECT sync_hrpc.c)

set_target_properties(
  sync_hrpc
  PROPERTIES
  C_STANDARD 99
)

target_include_directories(sync_hrpc PUBLIC .)

target_link_libraries(sync_hrpc PUBLIC compact rpc sync_schema)
